name: AI Partner Insights Tracker
description: AI-powered tool built with Replit agents to analyze multi-source feedback (surveys, partner interviews, community forums, support tickets). Improved PSAT by 8% and accelerated roadmap prioritization at Atlassian.

name: PM Workflow AI Agents
description: Suite of 5 AI agents for product management workflows using Vercel v0, Replit, Figma Make, and GPT-4/5. Enabled 20+ PMs to prototype rapid iterations, reducing time-to-market by 15%.

name: Marketplace Recommendation Engine
description: ML-driven recommendation and personalization system for Atlassian's $6B+ Marketplace. Ran 5 AI experiments across discovery, sponsored ads, and funnel optimization driving +3.7% conversion.

name: Billing Microservices Platform
description: End-to-end billing and checkout microservices (subscriptions, usage, quotes, payments) for Atlassian's cloud platform. Scaled to $1B ARR across 15+ products and 500+ Marketplace apps.

name: Enterprise Licensing Framework
description: Enterprise licensing system for Atlassian Marketplace apps. Enabled $15M+ ACV with clients like PwC, Citi, Ford, Honeywell, and Accenture, unlocking 600K+ enterprise seats.

name: Growth Experiment Framework
description: A/B testing and growth experiment framework for in-product purchases, upgrades, and reactivations. Achieved +3% first purchase growth and -4% churn across Atlassian commerce flows.

name: Foospot Smart Parking Platform
description: IoT/NFC-powered smart parking platform (co-founder). Reduced parking costs by 7.5x, served 6K+ customers/quarter. Launched at AutoExpo'16 and scaled across public and private lots.

name: Jobbie — AI Job Search Platform
description: AI-powered job search platform using RAG for intelligent matching. Aggregates listings from 9 sources (Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, etc.), features NLP search, resume-based matching, and an AI career assistant. Built with React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and vector search.

name: IC Reliability Infrastructure
description: Reliability infrastructure for Intel's $1B+ IoT and chip design portfolio. Standardized adoption across teams, saving ~$1M. Received AHM Star Award (top 0.5% of org).
